columns.extraction_plan: The number of patients in the control arm (ADT alone) is 393, as indicated in the CONSORT diagram (Figure 1, page 2) under 'Randomly assigned to ADT alone (n = 393)'. This is consistent with the 'No. of Patients' for 'Overall' in the 'ADT Alone' column of Table 1 (page 3), Table 2 (page 6), and Table 3 (page 6).
